summary: Joel Spolsky shares his enthusiasm for Kathy Sierra's talk at the Business of Software 2009 conference. He notes that Sierra made fun of Stack Overflow's VC-backed business model during her presentation, including a reference to the site's unicorn meme. The post is essentially a brief recommendation to watch her talk, with a plug for the upcoming Business of Software conference.
key_points: Kathy Sierra delivered a memorable talk at the Business of Software 2009 conference
Sierra humorously critiqued Stack Overflow's VC-backed business model during her presentation
Joel promotes the next Business of Software conference in Boston
money_quotes: Her talk at the Business of Software 2009 was amazing, even though, in retrospect, I realize now that she had a slide making fun of Stack Overflow's terrific new VC-backed business model.
key_insight: This is a brief promotional post recommending Kathy Sierra's conference talk, notable mainly for Joel's good-natured acknowledgment that she mocked Stack Overflow's business model.
